summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Training Courses feature and sidebar revisions. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Studio has light sidebar with dark main content, smaller menu text (12px/10px), Events/Announcements removed from sidebar. Role-based access working correctly: regular user blocked from /courses and /repository routes but can access /training-courses. Editor/Admin sees all 3 tabs (Catalog, Course Operations, Payment Schedule) while regular user only sees Catalog.

issues: Sidebar links query returns empty array in Playwright but visually sidebar shows correct items - likely timing/selector issue in test, not actual UI bug

critical_code_review_comments: Role-based visibility correctly implemented via Layout.js roles array on sidebar items
AdminEditorRoute wrapper correctly blocks /courses and /repository from regular users
Training Courses page conditionally renders admin tabs based on isPrivileged check
Studio theme correctly uses CSS variables [data-area='studio'] for dark main content with light sidebar
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed cohorts and members via backend tests for course operations testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Courses feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) Studio sidebar is light (rgb 245-234 gradient) with dark main content (rgb 39,42,53), (2) Menu text is 12px for links and 10px uppercase bold for group labels, (3) Events/Announcements not in sidebar, (4) Regular user blocked from /courses and /repository routes via AdminEditorRoute, (5) Regular user can access /training-courses and sees only Catalog tab, (6) Editor sees all 3 tabs: Catalog (14 course cards), Course Operations (cohort creation, member participation status, bulk installments), Payment Schedule (6 outstanding, €3200 total, €500 overdue).

features_verified.studio_light_sidebar: PASS - Light gradient background (rgb 245,247,250 to rgb 234,237,245)
features_verified.smaller_menu_text: PASS - 12px links, 10px uppercase bold group labels
features_verified.events_announcements_removed: PASS - Not present in Studio or School sidebar
features_verified.regular_user_catalog_only: PASS - No Course Operations or Payment Schedule tabs
features_verified.editor_all_tabs_visible: PASS - Catalog, Course Operations, Payment Schedule
features_verified.training_courses_search_filter: PASS - Search input and category/timing filters work
features_verified.course_operations_elements: PASS - Course/Edition selectors, create edition, add participant, bulk installments
features_verified.payment_schedule_overview: PASS - Summary cards and aggregated table with overdue/upcoming badges
features_verified.backend_cohort_with_course_id: PASS - Create cohort linked to course
features_verified.backend_member_participation_status: PASS - Add/update member with interested/confirmed/enrolled status
features_verified.backend_payment_overview: PASS - Aggregated summary with pending_count, total_pending_amount, overdue_amount
